options.purpose: Enable column fixing support and runtime fixing UI.
Mark an individual column as fixed.
Choose where the fixed column is anchored.

validationRules: If fixedPosition is set, fixed must be true.
Use right for trailing command or action columns.
Use sticky only when the column should become fixed while scrolling rather than always occupying a fixed band.

options.purpose: Allow users to resize grid columns.
Choose whether resizing changes the next column or the full widget width.
Allow users to drag columns to reorder them.
Allow users to show and hide columns.
Override resizing behavior for one column.
Override reordering behavior for one column.

validationRules: Enable column-level overrides only when the global behavior is too broad.
Keep command columns stable when reordering would make actions hard to find.

options.purpose: Show the built-in search panel.
Set contextual search placeholder text.
Show per-column filter inputs.
Show header filter menus.
Show the active filter panel.

validationRules: Use searchPanel for broad text search.
Use filterRow or headerFilter when users need field-specific filtering.

options.purpose: Choose the editing interaction model.
Allow adding records.
Allow updating records.
Allow deleting records.
Configure the popup used by popup editing.
Configure the form used by form or popup editing.

validationRules: For dense grids, prefer popup or form editing when row editing would create crowded cells.
Include validation rules on editable columns or form items when submitted data has constraints.

options.purpose: Enable expandable detail rows.
Render detail content for each master row.
Expand all detail rows by default.

validationRules: Use a detail template for row-specific secondary data.
Avoid autoExpandAll for large datasets unless the page is explicitly a review view.

options.purpose: Enable state persistence.
Choose where state is stored.
Set a stable storage key for local or session storage.
Load grid state from custom storage.
Save grid state to custom storage.
Debounce state saving.
Exclude selected column options from persisted state.

validationRules: Use a unique storageKey per grid and app context.
When user roles change visible columns, consider whether persisted state should ignore visibility or fixed-position options.

options.purpose: Choose row scrolling behavior.
Choose whether wide grids render columns virtually.
Give virtual or infinite scrolling a deterministic component height.
Defer selection state calculation for large or virtualized datasets.
Control whether select-all applies to all records or the current page.
Control when selection checkboxes are visible.
Adjust column widths to content.
Allow cell text to wrap instead of overflowing.
Control page size for paged grids.

validationRules: When scrolling.mode is virtual or infinite, specify grid height.
When using infinite scrolling with multiple selection, set selection.deferred=true or selection.selectAllMode=page.
Use virtual scrolling for very large local or remote datasets when paging alone is not enough.
For operational tables, preserve scanability before increasing visual spaciousness.

options.purpose: Expose the group panel so users can drag columns into grouping.
Control whether grouped rows start expanded.
Group by a column programmatically.
Add total summaries such as count, sum, min, max, or average.
Add summaries inside grouped rows.
Compute custom aggregate values.

validationRules: Use grouping and summaries for operational rollups before creating a separate dashboard.
Avoid auto-expanding all groups for large datasets unless the task is a compact review view.

options.purpose: Allow the grid to hide lower-priority columns when space is constrained.
Set column hiding order for adaptive layouts.
Let columns size to content.
Wrap long cell text instead of clipping.

validationRules: Set hiding priorities deliberately for columns that matter least on narrow screens.
Do not hide identity, status, or primary action columns unless an alternate detail surface exposes them.

options.purpose: Delegate grid shaping operations to a remote data source.
Run filtering remotely.
Run sorting remotely.
Run paging remotely.
Run grouping remotely.
Calculate summaries remotely.

validationRules: Use remoteOperations when local shaping would be too slow or inconsistent with backend authorization.
Ensure the backing endpoint supports every enabled remote operation.

options.purpose: Create a command column for row-level actions.
Define built-in or custom row action buttons.
Show actions conditionally by row state.
Open details or set context from a row click.
Update bulk action state when selection changes.

validationRules: Keep the primary row action visible when it is common and safe.
Use conditional visibility for permission- or state-dependent commands.
Use selection change events to enable, disable, or summarize bulk actions.

options.purpose: Configure the DataGrid toolbar.
Define built-in or custom toolbar items.
Configure export behavior.

validationRules: Use the grid toolbar for actions that operate directly on grid state.
Use a page-level dxToolbar for actions that operate across multiple widgets.
